mlb.headline: Fantasy baseball lineup advice for Saturday: Brewers' Gasser offers upside
mlb.summary: Everything you need to know to set your fantasy baseball lineups for Saturday's MLB action.

mlb.headline: Brewers activate Hamilton from IL, reassign Shewmake
mlb.summary: Brewers infielder David Hamilton has been activated from the injured list after recovering from a left hamstring strain.

mlb.headline: Royals manager Matt Quatraro back after brief leave
mlb.summary: Kansas City Royals manager Matt Quatraro will be back for the second game of the road series against the Detroit Tigers on Friday night, the club said on social media.

mlb.headline: Pete Crow-Armstrong leads 2026 MLB pre-arbitration bonus pool list
mlb.summary: Pete Crow-Armstrong leads the projected allocation of the 2026 Major League Baseball pre-arbitration bonus pool.

mlb.headline: Fantasy Baseball Forecaster Week 17: July 27-Aug. 2
mlb.summary: Set your lineups for the weeks ahead in fantasy baseball with our preview featuring pitcher rankings, hitter ratings and schedule observations.

mlb.headline: Fantasy baseball: Marte, Caglianone ailing and other Friday news
mlb.summary: All of the important fantasy spin and actionable takeaways resulting from the latest baseball news.

nhl.headline: Tortorella 'disappointed' by Vegas' decision, hopes for next job
nhl.summary: John Tortorella admits he was "disappointed" by the Golden Knights' decision not to retain him after their surprising run to the Stanley Cup Final but says he is already thinking about another coaching opportunity.

nhl.headline: 2026 NHL free agency tracker: News, contracts, grades, buzz
nhl.summary: Get up to speed on all the latest veteran additions teams are making beginning on June 30.

nhl.headline: Blue Jackets sign goaltender Jet Greaves to 3-year, $15M deal
nhl.summary: The Columbus Blue Jackets have signed goaltender Jet Greaves to a three-year, $15 million contract through the 2028-29 season.

nhl.headline: Patrick Kane returns to Blackhawks on two-year contract
nhl.summary: The Blackhawks and Patrick Kane have agreed to a two-year deal with an average annual value of $8 million as the winger returns to the team where he became an NHL superstar.

nhl.headline: Grading preseason bold predictions for all 32 NHL teams
nhl.summary: Steve Yzerman "failing up?" Spot on. Rangers returning to the playoffs? Not so much.

nhl.headline: Stars GM says signing Jason Robertson to long-term deal remains goal
nhl.summary: Stars GM Jim Nill said signing winger Jason Robertson to a long-term contract remains his goal, after the two sides ended a contentious negotiation with a one-year deal this week.

nba.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest free agency and trade updates
nba.summary: We're tracking deals, trades and buzz across the NBA, including the latest on LeBron James and the rest of offseason free agency.

nba.headline: How LeBron James' addition subtracts from his and every other Sixers' fantasy basketball value
nba.summary: LeBron James makes the 76ers a strong championship contender, but the individual Sixers' fantasy values take a hit.

nba.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
nba.summary: Here are the top highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast, from breaking news to the latest intel and reaction from around the NBA.

nba.headline: Perk: LeBron will bring out the best in Joel Embiid
nba.summary: Perk: LeBron will bring out the best in Joel Embiid

nba.headline: 2026 NBA free agency: Grades for offseason signings, extensions
nba.summary: We're grading the biggest free agent signings and extensions, including Victor Wembanyama signing a $252 million rookie extension.

nba.headline: Joel Embiid's campaign for LeBron to the 76ers started in 2014
nba.summary: Joel Embiid's social media pitch to LeBron James in 2014 is a full-circle moment now.

wnba.headline: 'No way!' Caitlin Clark reacts to LeBron signing for Sixers
wnba.summary: 'No way!' Caitlin Clark reacts to LeBron signing for Sixers

wnba.headline: Fantasy women's hoops:  10 things I learned about you, All-Star break edition
wnba.summary: From teams deep in fantasy production to players who have emerged as fantasy stars this season, 10 things we've learned so far in 2026.

wnba.headline: Stephen A. insists Caitlin Clark off-court headlines have to be addressed
wnba.summary: Stephen A. insists Caitlin Clark off-court headlines have to be addressed

wnba.headline: Does Caitlin Clark have a technical foul problem?
wnba.summary: Does Caitlin Clark have a technical foul problem?

wnba.headline: WNBA's future is bright, but will Cathy Engelbert be there to lead it?
wnba.summary: Stakeholders around the league question whether Engelbert is the right person to lead the WNBA into the future.

wnba.headline: Stakeholders question Engelbert's ability to lead WNBA into future
wnba.summary: The WNBA has a historic collective bargaining agreement in hand and is seeing unprecedented growth, but stakeholders in and around the league question whether commissioner Cathy Engelbert is the right person to lead it into the future.

wnba.headline: 2026 WNBA All-Star Game: Where to watch, time and more
wnba.summary: The league will take over the Windy City on Friday with the Kia WNBA Shooting Stars event and the State Farm WNBA 3-point contest.

wnba.headline: ESPN Original: 'Life in the W' -- Where to watch, times, more
wnba.summary: "Life in the W," a six-part ESPN Original docuseries, follows A'ja Wilson of the Las Vegas Aces, Napheesa Collier of the Minnesota Lynx and DeWanna Bonner of the Phoenix Mercury during the 2025 WNBA season.

wnba.headline: Brianna Turner: Fever fired employee for sexual harassment
wnba.summary: Brianna Turner said on social media that her former team, the Indiana Fever, fired a male employee last season for sexual harassment.

wnba.headline: Courtney Cronin criticizes WNBA commissioner Cathy Engelbert

cbb.headline: Sources: Duke-Michigan game off; Texas Tech replaces Wolverines

cbb.headline: NCAA Division I board: No plans to change age-based eligibility

cbb.headline: Source: No vote on college sports bill expected before August
cbb.summary: The Protect College Sports Act is not expected to be put to a full vote in the U.S. Senate before Congress takes its August recess, a congressional source told ESPN on Thursday.

cbb.headline: Tennessee State places AD Mikki Allen on administrative leave

tennis.headline: Dramatic Wimbledon women's final sets ESPN viewership record

tennis.headline: French tennis player's ban for match-fixing increased to 5 years
